chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Etiquettes of the Fasting Person, What Invalidates the Fast, and What Does Not Invalidate it

text: 1877 - وَ سَأَلَهُ سَمَاعَةُ : عَنِ اَلرَّجُلِ يَلْصَقُ بِأَهْلِهِ فِي شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ فَقَالَ «مَا لَمْ يَخَفْ عَلَى نَفْسِهِ فَلاَ بَأْسَ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1877 - Sama'ah asked Imam (as) about a man who closely interacts with his wife during the Month of Ramadan.
Imam (as) said: "As long as he does not fear for himself, there is no harm."
